name: tmdb-mcp
description: Search and look up movies, TV shows and people from The Movie Database (TMDB), with IMDb/Rotten Tomatoes/Metacritic ratings via OMDb.

tools.name: search_multi
tools.description: Search movies, TV and people at once.

tools.name: discover_movies
tools.description: Find movies by filters (genre, year, rating, …).

tools.name: search_keywords
tools.description: Resolve keyword names to ids for discover.

tools.name: find_by_imdb_id
tools.description: Resolve an IMDb id to TMDB entities.

tools.name: get_ratings
tools.description: IMDb/RT/Metacritic ratings by IMDb id or title.

tools.name: get_similar
tools.description: Titles similar to a movie or TV show.

tools.name: get_reviews
tools.description: User reviews for a movie or TV show.

tools.name: get_collection
tools.description: A movie collection/franchise and its parts.

prompts.name: recommend_similar
prompts.description: Plan a search for movies or TV shows similar to a title the user liked, using get_similar/recommendations/discover instead of the model's own knowledge.
prompts.text:
I liked "{{title}}". Recommend {{count}} similar movies or TV shows using the available tools — don't rely on your own memory for the candidate list or ratings.

1. Resolve "{{title}}" to a TMDB id: use search_multi (or search_movies/search_tv if the media type is already known) and pick the best match.
2. Call get_similar and get_movie_recommendations/get_tv_recommendations for that id and merge the candidates.
3. If that pool has fewer than {{count}} good candidates, broaden with discover_movies/discover_tv filtered to the same genres.
4. Return the best {{count}}: title, year, and a one-line reason it fits — include ratings (get_movie/get_tv's include_ratings, or get_ratings) where available.

tmdb_api_token.title: TMDB API Read Access Token
tmdb_api_token.description: Required. TMDB v4 'Read Access Token' from https://www.themoviedb.org/settings/api (sent as a Bearer token).

omdb_api_key.title: OMDb API Key
omdb_api_key.description: Optional. Free key from https://www.omdbapi.com/apikey.aspx — enables IMDb/Rotten Tomatoes/Metacritic ratings.

tmdb_language.title: Language
tmdb_language.description: Optional. Default response language as ISO-639-1, optionally with a region — e.g. 'ru-RU', 'en-US', 'ja'. Localizes titles, overviews and genre names. Defaults to en-US.

tmdb_region.title: Region
tmdb_region.description: Optional. Default ISO-3166-1 country code (e.g. 'US', 'RU', 'GB') for region-specific results like certifications. Defaults to US.
